name: Bird of Paradise
recipeIngredient: 1 can (20 oz.) sliced pineapple in syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve the syrup.
2. Brown the chicken in butter. Drain excess fat.
3. In a saucepan, combine the reserved syrup with sherry, soy sauce, garlic, and ginger.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Cover and simmer on low heat for 30 minutes, turning the chicken once halfway through cooking.
6. Remove the cooked chicken from the pan.
7. Add the pineapple, red bell pepper, celery, green onion, and papaya (if using) back to the pan.
8. Dissolve cornstarch in half a cup of water.
9. Stir the dissolved cornstarch mixture into the pan.
10. Bring the sauce to a boil.
11. When thickened, spoon the sauce over the chicken.
